request: Rank the four best BMW M3 generations
title: RANKING THE BEST BMW M3 GENERATIONS
close_narration: Which M3 generation is your favorite?
order_rationale: Ordered from fourth to first based on performance, historical significance, and enthusiast acclaim.

entries.name: E92
entries.label: ONLY V8 M3
entries.one_line_fact: The E92 M3 is the only M3 generation powered by a naturally aspirated V8 engine.

entries.name: F80
entries.label: TURBOCHARGED RETURN
entries.one_line_fact: The F80 M3 marked the return to a turbocharged inline-six engine, delivering 425 horsepower.

entries.name: E30
entries.label: HOMOLOGATION LEGEND
entries.one_line_fact: The E30 M3 was originally developed as a homologation model for Group A touring car racing.

entries.name: E46
entries.label: PERFECT BALANCE
entries.one_line_fact: The E46 M3 is renowned for its near-perfect chassis balance and high-revving inline-six engine.
